category_sources: source_facts.description says logcli runs LogQL queries against a Loki server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides logcli; source_facts.homepage identifies Grafana Loki as the parent project.
docs_sources: Official Grafana Loki documentation has a dedicated logcli page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/grafana/loki, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LogQL and Loki; official Grafana docs document logcli usage.
